01. DOP ADVANTAGES

INTRODUCING: SELECTIVE TRANSPARENCY

DOP’s Ingenious Solution Preserves The Essence Of Decentralized Data Sharing, While Also Safeguarding Sensitive Financial Data From Prying Eyes.

Never before, has a data-protection protocol managed to achieve:
FLEXIBLE TRANSPARENCY

DOP empowers users with flexible transparency. You can choose what to share and with whom, whether it's the visibility of specific tokens or the amount of assets.

REGULATORY COMPLIANCE

DOP is committed to regulation-friendly privacy. By collaborating with industry leaders like Chainalysis and zkMe, we're ensuring a high level of compliance.

USER EXPERIENCE

DOP ensures that the protocol is fast and easy to use. By integrating DOP with familiar applications, we make it easily accessible and user-friendly.

02. AUDITORS | PARTNERS

INTEGRATION RUNS IN OUR CODE

DOP's strategy prioritizes collaboration and interoperability, aspiring to deliver our protocol to the masses through seamless integration with leading wallets and dApps.

Audited by

Native Integrations

Core Collaborators

Core Collaborators

03. STATS

A MARKET RIPE FOR REVOLUTION

Interoperability and seamless integration with existing wallets and dApps are some of the major staples in DOP's architecture. We're not offering a niche solution — we're democratizing data ownership for the mainstream assets you already cherish.

DOP (Data Ownership Protocol) is an innovative approach to data ownership that sets a new standard in blockchain technology.
